'''鈭歜-n-l''' ('''kabanal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pollenise|pollenise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pollenise|pollenise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-n-l
|-
! Lemma
| kabanal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibanal|thibanal]] || [[word:jibanal|jibanal]] || [[word:shibanal|shibanal]] || [[word:kibanal|kibanal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubanal|thuthubanal]] || [[word:jujubanal|jujubanal]] || [[word:shushubanal|shushubanal]] || [[word:kukubanal|kukubanal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubanal|thubanal]] || [[word:jubanal|jubanal]] || [[word:shubanal|shubanal]] || [[word:kubanal|kubanal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubanal|thubanal]] || [[word:jubanal|jubanal]] || [[word:shubanal|shubanal]] || [[word:kubanal|kubanal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebanal|thebanal]] || [[word:jebanal|jebanal]] || [[word:shebanal|shebanal]] || [[word:kebanal|kebanal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobanal|thothobanal]] || [[word:jojobanal|jojobanal]] || [[word:shoshobanal|shoshobanal]] || [[word:kokobanal|kokobanal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobanal|thobanal]] || [[word:jobanal|jobanal]] || [[word:shobanal|shobanal]] || [[word:kobanal|kobanal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobanal|thobanal]] || [[word:jobanal|jobanal]] || [[word:shobanal|shobanal]] || [[word:kobanal|kobanal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]] || [[word:banal|banal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙banal|th忙banal]] || [[word:j忙banal|j忙banal]] || [[word:sh忙banal|sh忙banal]] || [[word:k忙banal|k忙banal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabanal|thathabanal]] || [[word:jajabanal|jajabanal]] || [[word:shashabanal|shashabanal]] || [[word:kakabanal|kakabanal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabanal|thabanal]] || [[word:jabanal|jabanal]] || [[word:shabanal|shabanal]] || [[word:kabanal|kabanal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabanal|thabanal]] || [[word:jabanal|jabanal]] || [[word:shabanal|shabanal]] || [[word:kabanal|kabanal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabanal|shabanal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabanal|goshabanal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabanal|gokishabanal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabanaln眉|shabanaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabanalnkn眉|goshabanalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabanaln眉|gokishabanaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabanalsh毛|shabanalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabanalnksh毛|goshabanalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabanalsh毛|gokishabanalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabanalro|shabanalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabanalnkro|goshabanalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabanalro|gokishabanalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabanalmu|shabanalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabanalnkmu|goshabanalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabanalmu|gokishabanalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabanalsher|shabanalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabanalnksher|goshabanalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabanalsher|gokishabanalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabanalng|shabanalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabanalnkng|goshabanalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabanalng|gokishabanalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabanalya|shabanalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabanalnkya|goshabanalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabanalya|gokishabanalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabanalyam|shabanalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabanalnkyam|goshabanalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabanalyam|gokishabanalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabanaln眉sh毛|shabanaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabanalnkn眉sh毛|goshabanalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabanaln眉sh毛|gokishabanaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabanaln眉ro|shabanaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabanalnkn眉ro|goshabanalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabanaln眉ro|gokishabanaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabanaln眉mu|shabanaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabanalnkn眉mu|goshabanalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabanaln眉mu|gokishabanaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabanalsh毛n眉|shabanalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabanalnksh毛n眉|goshabanalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabanalsh毛n眉|gokishabanalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabanalsh毛ro|shabanalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabanalnksh毛ro|goshabanalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabanalsh毛ro|gokishabanalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabanalsh毛mu|shabanalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabanalnksh毛mu|goshabanalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabanalsh毛mu|gokishabanalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabanalron眉|shabanalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabanalnkron眉|goshabanalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabanalron眉|gokishabanalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabanalrosh毛|shabanalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabanalnkrosh毛|goshabanalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabanalrosh毛|gokishabanalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabanalromu|shabanalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabanalnkromu|goshabanalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabanalromu|gokishabanalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabanalmun眉|shabanalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabanalnkmun眉|goshabanalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabanalmun眉|gokishabanalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabanalmush毛|shabanalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabanalnkmush毛|goshabanalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabanalmush毛|gokishabanalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabanalmuro|shabanalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabanalnkmuro|goshabanalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabanalmuro|gokishabanalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
